description: Add league and cup selection so team generation uses format-specific PvPoke rankings and simulations for Great, Ultra, Master, and Kanto Cup.

userStories.title: Create battle format catalog
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a typed battle format catalog so UI, API, algorithm, and sync layers share one source of truth for supported formats.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a typed format catalog with ids, labels, cup, and cp for Great League, Ultra League, Master League, and Kanto Cup
Add a default format id for Great League
Add helper validation/lookup utilities for format ids
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add Select and Option atoms with chevron icons
userStories.description: As a user, I want a reusable select component with clear affordance so format selection is consistent with project styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Select atom with floating label behavior adapted to this project's theme classes
Create Option atom for option rendering
Add ChevronDownIcon and ChevronUpIcon to atom icons and export them
Select renders correctly in light and dark themes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add format dropdown to Team Configuration
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select a battle format at the top of Team Configuration so team generation targets the right league or cup.
acceptanceCriteria: Place format selector at the top of Team Configuration above tournament mode
Dropdown options are exactly Great League, Ultra League, Master League, and Kanto Cup
Default selected option is Great League
TeamManager stores selected format state and passes it to config panel
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Send and validate formatId in generate-team API
userStories.description: As a user, I want my selected format sent to the backend so generated teams use the requested data context.
acceptanceCriteria: Client generate-team request payload includes formatId
API validates formatId against supported format catalog
Invalid formatId returns HTTP 400 with a clear message
API passes validated formatId into generation options
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Load rankings by selected format
userStories.description: As a user, I want ranking-based scoring to come from the selected format so results reflect the correct meta.
acceptanceCriteria: Rankings loader resolves CSV paths by selected cup/cp/category
Ranking helper APIs accept an optional formatId and default to Great League
Ranking caches are isolated by format to prevent cross-format contamination
Missing ranking files for selected format raise handled errors
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Use format-aware Pokemon pool in algorithm
userStories.description: As a user, I want candidate Pokemon chosen from selected format rankings so generation honors league and cup restrictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Algorithm obtains top-ranked names from selected format
Pokemon eligibility filtering uses selected format context
Kanto Cup generation is restricted to Kanto ranking pool
Genetic operators and fitness formulas remain unchanged
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Load simulations by selected format and block missing data
userStories.description: As a user, I want matchup analysis tied to the selected format and clear failure behavior when required data is missing.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulation loader parses and indexes files by format-aware naming
Simulation helper APIs accept an optional formatId and default to Great League
Team generation blocks with a clear error when selected format simulations are missing
No silent fallback to Great League when non-Great format is selected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Sync rankings for all supported formats
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want rankings sync to generate outputs for all supported formats so runtime lookups have complete data.
acceptanceCriteria: Rankings sync iterates formats all/1500, all/2500, all/10000, and kanto/1500
Generate overall, leads, switches, and closers CSVs for each supported format
Output filenames encode cup/cp/category deterministically
Validation runs for each generated CSV
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Sync simulations for all supported formats
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want simulation sync to run PvPoke TeamRanker per format so coverage and threat analysis are format-correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulation sync runs TeamRanker with correct cup and cp per selected format
Generate 0-0, 1-1, and 2-2 CSVs per target species for each supported format
Resume mode reuses valid files only for the same format
Output filenames encode format, species, and scenario deterministically
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Validate end-to-end generation for all four formats
userStories.description: As a user, I want confidence that all supported formats generate valid teams so I can use the app for multiple metas.
acceptanceCriteria: Great League generates using all/1500 data
Ultra League generates using all/2500 data
Master League generates using all/10000 data
Kanto Cup generates using kanto/1500 data
Missing format data shows clear error and blocks generation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
